caption:
Google reviews are the fastest free way to move up local search. Most businesses we look at around Sault Ste. Marie have a handful of them and wonder why they stay invisible.

Four steps. All free. You can start this week.

Swipe through. The step most owners skip is replying to reviews.

What's your review count right now? Tell us below.

#SaultSteMarie #NorthernOntario #LocalSEO
first_comment: Free Google Business Profile visibility check for Northern Ontario businesses: glvmarketing.ca
